summary: Frontend testing completed for SnapRoad comprehensive features including Driver Analytics, Admin Offer Management with automatic gem pricing. All 10 test scenarios passed successfully.

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic only, charts render correctly after viewport change

critical_code_review_comments: Analytics is correctly positioned at top of Profile menu items (MENU_ITEMS array line 27)
Gem pricing logic correctly implements user specification: ≤10%=50 gems (40 premium), >10%=80 gems (65 premium), free=100 gems (80 premium)
AdminOfferManagement properly shows Source URL column and automatic gem pricing preview
DriverAnalytics shows all required metrics: safety score, stats cards, weekly performance, driving behavior
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: None - ALL DATA IS MOCKED in components
context_for_next_testing_agent: App accessible at /app route. All new features working: 1) DriverAnalytics at Profile->Analytics with full metrics 2) AdminOfferManagement with automatic gem pricing guide and offer table showing Source URL and Gem Costs 3) Family screen working. Key test IDs: profile-menu-analytics, admin-nav-offers, welcome-admin-portal-btn. ALL DATA IS MOCKED - no real backend API integration.
mocked_data_note: ALL DATA IN FIGMA UI COMPONENTS IS MOCKED - no real backend API integration for authentication or data persistence.
